purpose: Trigger-quality evaluation prompts for the skill-creator Agent Skill.
usage: Use these prompts to test whether the skill triggers on genuine Agent Skill authoring and auditing tasks while avoiding false positives on adjacent creation, documentation, or coding tasks.

cases.query: Create a new Agent Skill for extracting structured tables from PDFs and make sure it is portable across agents.
cases.why: Explicit request to create a portable Agent Skill.

cases.query: Help me rewrite this SKILL.md so the skill is easier to share publicly and follows Agent Skills best practices.
cases.why: Direct request to revise a SKILL.md for shareability and best-practice compliance.

cases.query: Audit this skill folder for publication quality, trigger clarity, and progressive disclosure.
cases.why: Direct audit request for a skill folder.

cases.query: Turn this one-off workflow into a reusable Agent Skill with scripts, references, and a clean trigger description.
cases.why: Explicit conversion of an ad hoc workflow into an Agent Skill.

cases.query: Review my skill directory and tell me whether some content should move from SKILL.md into references/.
cases.why: Direct request about skill structure and progressive disclosure.

cases.query: I want a generalizable and shareable Agent Skill for code-review workflows. Draft the folder structure and SKILL.md.
cases.why: Explicit request to draft a shareable Agent Skill.

cases.query: Write a Python script to extract tables from PDFs.
cases.why: Implementation task only; no request to create or audit an Agent Skill.

cases.query: Improve this README so contributors understand the repository layout.
cases.why: Documentation editing task, not skill authoring.

cases.query: Create a reusable project template for a command-line tool.
cases.why: Project scaffolding request, not Agent Skill creation.

cases.query: Clean up this markdown guide and split long sections into separate files.
cases.why: Similar restructuring pattern, but not in the context of an Agent Skill.

cases.query: Review this spreadsheet of employee skills and group them into categories.
cases.why: Uses the word 'skills' in a human-resources sense, unrelated to Agent Skills.

cases.query: Build a small library for validating YAML frontmatter in Markdown files.
cases.why: Tooling/code task adjacent to skill authoring, but not itself a request to create or audit an Agent Skill.
